content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[FACT_UTM_PARAMETERS_VALUE]

GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[FACT_UTM_PARAMETERS_VALUE]
(
	[UTMID] [nvarchar](255) NULL,
	[InboundQueueID] [nvarchar](255) NULL,
	[LeadID] [nvarchar](255) NULL,
	[GCLID] [nvarchar](255) NULL,
	[UTMAccount] [nvarchar](255) NULL,
	[UTMMedium] [nvarchar](255) NULL,
	[UTMSource] [nvarchar](255) NULL,
	[UTMCampaign] [nvarchar](255) NULL,
	[UTMContent] [nvarchar](255) NULL,
	[UTMTerm] [nvarchar](255) NULL,
	[PropertyType] [nvarchar](255) NULL,
	[UTMCampaignID] [nvarchar](255) NULL,
	[UTMAdID] [nvarchar](255) NULL,
	[UTMAdSetID] [nvarchar](255) NULL,
	[LP_UTMID] INT NULL,
	[LP_InboundQueueID] INT NULL,
	[LP_LeadID] INT NULL,
	[LP_GCLID] NVARCHAR(64) NULL,
	[LP_UTMCampaignID] INT NULL,
	[LP_UTMAdID] INT NULL,
	[LP_UTMAdSetID] INT NULL,
	[Division] NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    [LastUpdateTS] [datetime] NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [UTMID] ),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
